mnemonics.title: Independence Check
mnemonics.content: Multiply Separate Probabilities (MSP) for independent events

acronyms.usage: Core concept grouping for the module

visualTips.visualization: Venn diagram with shaded overlap area divided by entire B circle
Two non-overlapping rectangles with area products matching overlap

analogies.analogy: Like filtering search results - probability within a subset
Parallel subway lines - one's delay doesn't affect the other
